title: Weapons from GTA SA
description: Weapons from GTA SA for Minecraft in the style of icons from the interface.
body:
This mod adds iconic weapons from GTA San Andreas!
Only for creative mode!

**Firearms**
- Desert Eagle — a powerful pistol
- Pump—action shotgun - large spread of bullets
- M4 — a rifle with a large magazine
- Sniper rifle — accurate shooting at long range

**Melee weapons**
- Knife — deals double damage when attacking from behind
- Baseball bat — throws enemies aside with a strong blow
- Katana — extremely high attack speed

**Explosives**
- Grenade — explodes within a radius of 4 blocks, does not destroy blocks
- Molotov cocktail — sets everything on fire within a 4 block radius
